---
title: "Data sources"
description: "Provenance, capture, and metadata for upstream ALIGN datasets."
---

Source documentation explains what ALIGN ingests, where the data originates, how it is captured, and which identifiers or assertions it contributes to the canonical registry.

## Current source documentation

- [DrugBank](drugbank.qmd): product baseline, identifiers, vocabulary, and `drugbank_type` provenance.
- [National regulatory authorities](national-regulatory-authorities.qmd): capture and harmonization for Kenya, Senegal, and South Africa.
- [WHO prequalification](who-prequalification.qmd): product categories, downloads, and dataset inventory.

Additional source pages will be promoted from `reports/` after their extraction workflows no longer depend on workstation-specific paths or live network access during site rendering.
